calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff; Defendant Bishara Mudawar appearing on his own behalf. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend The Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
